name: Kona Inn Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, cream the sugar and butter until light and lemon-colored.
2. Add the mashed bananas and beaten eggs; stir well to combine all ingredients.
3. Sift together the flour, salt, and baking soda into the mixture, then add the chopped nuts.
4. Mix until everything is thoroughly blended, but be careful not to overmix.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Pour the batter into two prepared loaf pans.
7. Bake for 45 minutes.
The original recipe text included additional commentary and personal anecdotes that are not part of a standard recipe format. This version focuses solely on the title, ingredients, and clear instructions.
